hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("package-lock\\.json")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"package-lock.json is managed by npm automatically."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("\\.env")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env files contain secrets and must not be edited by AI."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("CHANGELOG\\.md")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CHANGELOG.md is generated automatically by the release tooling."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("(^|/)dist/")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"dist/ contains build artifacts and must not be edited manually."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("(^|/)coverage/")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"coverage/ contains generated test reports and must not be edited manually."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("--legacy-peer-deps")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"--legacy-peer-deps is not allowed. Never modify npm peer dependency resolution behavior."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("git push.*(--force| -f)")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git push --force is blocked. Force-pushing can overwrite shared remote history."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0

jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("git reset --hard")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git reset --hard is blocked. This irreversibly discards local changes."}}' && exit 1 || exit 0
